systems.name: Shirube
systems.boundary: Work Order OS, phase conveyor, policy/evidence/trace governance, role verdict projection.

systems.name: AUN
systems.boundary: Optional acceleration layer for communication, dispatch, queueing, mirroring, and evidence transport.

systems.name: Kusabi
systems.boundary: Canonical memory, recovery, and continuity evidence product. Wasurezu remains a legacy alias/tooling/runtime name where present.

systems.name: Kodama
systems.boundary: Source/context registry and context-pack evidence provider.

systems.name: GitHub
systems.boundary: Durable issue, PR, review, comment, and check state SSOT for GitHub-backed work.

systems.name: Runners
systems.boundary: Codex, Claude, local scripts, AUN-dispatched runners, or humans execute scoped work under runner policy.

control_boundaries.policy_decisions: Shirube deterministic policy/evidence/trace logic in future PRs.
control_boundaries.transport_evidence: AUN ACK, queue ids, and Discord messages can be cited as transport evidence only.
control_boundaries.context_evidence: Kusabi and Kodama can provide continuity or source context evidence, not completion authority.
control_boundaries.merge_or_completion: Requires durable evidence, required role verdicts, and exact-head binding.

role_separation.auditor: Independently checks governance, evidence, risk, and policy.
role_separation.cto_flow_owner: Approves protected direction or scope expansion.
